title: July 10
content:
<noinclude>{{Top|real|nocat=1}}
{{Month|July}}

'''July 10''' is the 191st day of the year (192nd in leap years), with 174 days remaining.</noinclude>

*[[1930s#1930|1930]] – [[Bruce Boa]] is born.
*[[1940s#1941|1941]] – [[Robert Pine]] is born.
*[[1940s#1949|1949]] – [[Winston Rekert]] is born.
*[[1950s#1950|1950]] – [[Nick Jameson]] is born.
*[[1950s#1958|1958]] – [[Fiona Shaw]] is born.
*[[1960s#1969|1969]] – [[Jamie Glover]] is born.
*[[1972]] – [[Simone Bianchi]] is born.
*1972 – [[Peter Serafinowicz]] is born.
*[[1977]] – [[Gwendoline Yeo]] is born.
*[[2002]] – [[Star Wars Infinities: The Empire Strikes Back 1|''Star Wars Infinities: The Empire Strikes Back'' 1]] published.
*2002 – ''[[The Official Star Wars Fact File 28]]'' published.
*[[2008]] – [[Star Wars Insider 102|''Star Wars Insider'' 102]] published in '''UK'''.
*[[2013]] – [[Star Wars (2013) 7|''Star Wars'' (2013) 7]] published.
*[[2018]] – ''[[William Shakespeare's Jedi the Last: Star Wars Part the Eighth]]'' published.
*2018 – ''[[Star Wars: Rogue One Adaptation]]'' published.
*[[2019]] – [[Age of Resistance - Captain Phasma 1|''Age of Resistance - Captain Phasma'' 1]] published.
*2019 – [[Star Wars (2015) 68|''Star Wars'' (2015) 68]] published.
*[[2024]] – [[Ahsoka 1|''Ahsoka'' 1]] published.
*2024 – [[The High Republic Adventures (2023) 7|''The High Republic Adventures'' (2023) 7]] published.
